title: Network Maintenance
content: The IT Department will perform scheduled maintenance on the internal network. During this period, some systems may be temporarily unavailable. Please save your work before the maintenance window.
author: IT Department

title: Annual Company Meeting
description: All employees are invited to join the annual company meeting.
content: The annual meeting will cover company performance, future strategy, and upcoming projects. Your participation is highly appreciated.
author: Human Resource Department

title: New Employee Benefit Program
description: Updated employee benefits are now available.
content: The company has introduced a new benefit program including health packages, training support, and employee activities.
author: Human Resource Department

title: New Dashboard Released
description: Management dashboard version 2.0 is now available.
content: The new dashboard provides better reporting, improved performance, and easier access to business analytics.
author: Business Intelligence Team

title: System Security Update
description: Important security updates will be applied this weekend.
content: The IT team will update security patches on all internal servers to improve protection against vulnerabilities.
author: IT Security Team
